task_completion.description: Page 1 has the title 'Cystic Fibrosis Pedigree Analysis'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text reading 'Cystic Fibrosis Pedigree Analysis' prominently displayed at the top of the first page in the ActivInspire canvas.

task_completion.description: Page 1 has a legend explaining pedigree symbols: square for male, circle for female, filled shape for affected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a legend area on Page 1 containing a square with the label 'Male', a circle with the label 'Female', and a filled/shaded shape with the label 'Affected' (or equivalent wording).

task_completion.description: Page 2 shows Generation I: one square (male) and one circle (female) connected by a horizontal marriage line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the top row of the pedigree diagram on Page 2 showing one square shape and one circle shape side by side, joined by a horizontal line between them.

task_completion.description: Page 2 shows Generation II: four children connected to Generation I by descent lines and a horizontal sibship line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a second row of approximately 4-5 shapes (mix of squares and circles) below the Generation I couple, connected by vertical line(s) descending from the marriage line and a horizontal sibship line.

task_completion.description: Page 2 shows Generation III: three children of the Gen II couple, connected by descent lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a third row of 3 shapes (mix of squares and circles) below a Generation II couple, connected upward by vertical descent lines and a sibship line.

task_completion.description: At least 2 individuals in the pedigree are visually filled or shaded to indicate affected status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 2 shapes in the pedigree that are filled with a solid color or shaded, visually distinct from the unfilled/hollow shapes representing unaffected individuals.

task_completion.description: Individual shapes are labeled with genotypes (AA, Aa, or aa).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels containing 'AA', 'Aa', or 'aa' placed near or below the individual shapes in the pedigree chart.

task_completion.description: Marriage lines (horizontal) and descent lines (vertical) visually connect the generations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for horizontal lines connecting mated pairs and vertical lines descending from these to offspring rows. The line structure should visually link the three generations.

task_completion.description: Page 3 has a summary table with columns for Genotype, Phenotype, and Ratio, with rows for AA, Aa, and aa.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a structured table on Page 3 with column headers 'Genotype', 'Phenotype', and 'Ratio' and rows containing 'AA' (Unaffected), 'Aa' (Carrier), and 'aa' (Affected) with corresponding ratio values.
The ActivInspire title bar shows 'cystic_fibrosis_pedigree' rather than 'Untitled', indicating the file has been saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with ActivInspire's toolbars, canvas, shape tools, and text tools rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent manually drew shapes and typed text rather than pasting a pre-made image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of individual shape objects, text boxes, and line objects being placed or selected in ActivInspire, not a single imported image.

integrity.description: The agent used ActivInspire and not a different application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface must be ActivInspire, identifiable by its specific toolbars, menus (File/Edit/View/Insert/Tools/Help), and page browser layout.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart saved as 'cystic_fibrosis_pedigree.flipchart' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Flipcharts\. Page 1 must have the title 'Cystic Fibrosis Pedigree Analysis' and a legend explaining square=male, circle=female, filled=affected. Page 2 must contain a three-generation pedigree chart: Generation I has 2 individuals (1 square, 1 circle) connected by a marriage line; Generation II has 4 children plus 1 spouse from outside (5 total shapes) connected by sibship and descent lines; Generation III has 3 children connected by descent lines. At least 2 shapes must be filled/shaded (the affected aa individuals). Genotype labels (AA, Aa, aa) should appear near each individual. Page 3 must have a summary table with columns Genotype/Phenotype/Ratio containing rows for AA (Unaffected), Aa (Carrier), aa (Affected), plus the ratios 1:2:1 (genotypic) and 3:1 (phenotypic). The flipchart should contain a minimum of 25 total shapes (10 individual shapes, 12+ connecting lines, legend shapes, table rectangles).
